arts.ttl: 'You don’t know what you’re going to get' verdict as Everton vs Newcastle United prediction made
arts.sum: "They showed great character after going 1-0 down and McNeil got a couple of goals, but I thought Newcastle produced their best performance of the season against Man City. As always, the Premier League pundits have been making their predictions for this weekend's games - here's what they have had to say on Everton vs Newcastle United.

arts.ttl: Eddie Howe: Newcastle leaving St James’ Park would feel like a betrayal
arts.sum: The Magpies will make a decision on the way forward in early 2025.

arts.ttl: Losing my job was a big shock - but managing Everton remains my dream
arts.sum: Steven Schumacher said he remained unsure of the reasons behind his dismissal at Stoke City but that he is determined not to let the setback get in the way of his dreams

arts.ttl: Exclusive: Newcastle could sign ‘incredible’ Almiron upgrade for free in 2025 on one condition
arts.sum: Newcastle United are reportedly understood to have been monitoring Bayern Munich attacker Leroy Sane for some time now. The Magpies’ ability to potentially land the German international’s signature, however, will depend greatly on their Premier League performance. arts.ttl: Newcastle winger with 60m release clause set for imminent exit in January
arts.sum: Newcastle United continue to go from strength to strength under the Saudi Public Investment Fund’s ownership and Eddie Howe’s guidance, and in order to improve, players such as Miguel Almiron will unfortunately, and inevitably, fall by the wayside. arts.ttl: Newcastle United handed treble injury boost for Everton as Eddie Howe reveals good news
arts.sum: Howe, speaking at his pre-match Press conference ahead of the trip with Everton, said: "We hope Alex will be back, with Callum, for the first game after the international break. The big double boost on the horizon after the international break is anticipated to be the return of Isak and longstanding treatment room occupant Callum Wilson.

arts.ttl: Everton announce another new stadium feature as supporters and legends celebrated
arts.sum: Everton have announced a commemorative ‘fan wall’ at the club's new stadium celebrating legends and supporters

arts.ttl: Exclusive: Newcastle face serious competition to land Serbian wonder kid who dazzled against Inter
arts.sum: Although Red Star were well beaten by Inter in their recent Champions League match-up, the quality shown by the visitors Andrija Maksimovic stood out like a sore thumb. At just 17 years of age, Maksimovic is already making some of European football’s biggest teams sit up and take notice. arts.ttl: Everton legend Duncan Ferguson takes remarkable new step to help save Inverness
arts.sum: After taking two significant wage cuts, Goodison Park great Duncan Ferguson is now working for free as manager of Inverness Caledonian Thistle, who must raise £200,000 in two weeks
